calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd
Off Calendar Sep-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Carol Salvagione, Esq. for Plaintiff: Hedani, Choy, Spalding & Salvagione, LLP.
Order waiving live testimony signed 8-17-04 in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Gi-Hoon Kim as follows:
Principal $26,926.67
Interest $4,472.80
Costs $447.50, for a total of $31,846.97
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Continued To Oct-08-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
